nasb.text: Anyone who has set aside the Law of Moses dies without mercy on the testimony of two or three witnesses.

esv.text: Anyone who has set aside the law of Moses dies without mercy on the evidence of two or three witnesses.

cnv.text: 如果有人干犯了摩西的律法，憑著兩三個證人，他尚且得不到憐憫而死；

ccb.text: 人违犯摩西的律法，经两三个人指证后，尚且被毫不留情地处死，

csbs.text: 任何拒绝摩西律法的人，凭两个或三个见证人的见证，就得不到怜悯而死，
